description: Add the demanded formula. FactKey::TypeDefined(TypeName) carrying Presence, plus a TypeName->Ty typed store like FunctionContractMap. Job::DeriveTypeDef resolves ONE type name body to a hard Ty, minting nominal types inner-in-symbol via mint_brand(inner,name). Sibling and cross-module refs resolve by reading TypeDefined and waiting/demanding -- the work graph is the fixpoint, so build_module_type_env loop is not ported. DeriveTypeDef is strictly PULLED, never queued at note time: a @type no reached consumer reads stays cold like an uncalled function. Verify: drive test that a referenced @type publishes TypeDefined once and an unreferenced one stays cold.
title: DeriveTypeDef formula + TypeDefined fact + TypeName->Ty store
